title: helmia campestris
intro: Hemia campestris, also known as the helmia plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, which is native to Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hemia campestris include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Hemia campestris can be prepared in various ways, including making tea from its leaves and roots, or using its essential oil in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
